item.title: Mentally healthy dump: beauty
item.description:
From what I understand this is a little girl finding out she's been adopted.
"Красота спасёт мир" "The world will be saved by beauty" - 'The Idiot' by Fyodor Dostoyevsky Allowing compassion to take point on our path through life has unique challenges. Sometimes people take advantage of you and it's easy to want to blame them, to blame the world, to let our hearts turn cold, succumbing to the same fears and isolation. Meeting our own budding apathy, or the apathy of others with curious compassion is a potent antidote. I've had people tell me that being nice won't get me anywhere, that people will fuck me over, that I'm being foolish, naive, that I'm acting like an idiot. I've certainly felt that way before. But I've been cruel. I've been calloused. I've taken advantage of people. And I've seen the beauty I'm capable of when I treat myself with curious compassion. I'm grateful for my idiot eyes being open today. On the days they rest, I can't see the beauty, and I feel more alone than I have words to express. And so I'm grateful for my idiot comrades gently prying them back open. I hope this can do the same for you. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

mood
trans rights!!
owo
adorable
Here's something to keep you up at night: If the US does invade Greenland, Denmark is a NATO country and an EU country, meaning an attack by the US will likely mean Canada, The UK, and the Rest of the EU declare war on the USA, sparking World War 3.
lol wat
Coincidence? I think not.
Centaur rights now!
D:
They want LGBTQ people mistreated and people in massive amounts of debt because they want indentured servants who produce more indentured servants.
uwu
Despite their appearances, Linux absolutely bodies both of them.
Hi Hugo
EMAILS!
burn it all down
why is the bird upside down.
It terrifies them.

item.title: F*CK You President Trump
item.description: As a Canadian living in a border Town with friends in Canada and the United States this trade war that Donald Trump has started is going to be terrible for everyone. Hopefully sanity will prevail, but I don't think Donald Trump is sane.

Multipass

item.title: I love my country, Canada.
item.description: As a proud Canadian, I love to see, and be a part of, the solidarity in standing up to the American aggression (a phrase I'd never thought I'd have to say). The tariffs are outrageous, and I hope my country stands tall, takes it on the chin, and shows Trump what it means to be Canadian. We slap knives to our feet and get in fist fights on ice for fun in between hucking 120 kph hockey pucks at one another. We share this land with polar bears, grizzlers and snakes. So, we know a snake like you when we see it, Trump. You think we're weak? Think we'll roll over? I would die for the sovereignty of my country, Canada. You fucked up, dump.
item.dc:creator: Bleeeeeep

item.title: Not surprised just disappointed. Only went on there to see my nieces and nephews grow up.
item.description: My family is all from Vista, Ca but the second they all packed up and moved to Texas all the shit hit the fan. They're now hateful people and I get it you believe what you want to but don't push that bs on me. I literally just want to see pictures of the family since y'all only post to Facebook. I guess I don't need to see a bunch of racist anymore, win for me. I do feel bad for the kids tho.
